title: [Brayern Isle, Cliffside Watch]
description: A stone wall and a plank-reinforced stone floor define the edges of this canopy-covered hollow erected in a small cliffside pocket.  A narrow path toward a vine-twisted opening offers access, as does a rope ladder along the cliff face.  Built on river rock slabs is a small bonfire, with several chairs set around it.  A metal viewing glass wrapped in vines is propped against the stone wall, offering a view of the jungle below or of the churning mana storm that surrounds the island.  The area is lit by several lanterns attached to the cliff face.
